100 Years Ago Today, This is What Was Happening ...

On March 15, 1926, the British Empire faced mounting tensions as a general strike loomed in India, fueled by growing demands for independence from colonial rule. In the United States, debates surrounding Prohibition intensified, with various cities witnessing increasing calls for reform. Meanwhile, in Germany, political instability continued to rise amidst economic struggles, raising concerns over the Weimar Republic's stability.
